title: ceratophyllum australe
intro: Ceratophyllum australe, also known as Australian hornwort, is a floating aquatic plant that belongs to the family Ceratophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratophyllum australe include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
